_publications._publicationTitle: A single-cell atlas of Schwannoma across genetic backgrounds and anatomic locations.

_contextSnippet: Within the fibroblasts with Chr 22 deletion, only one cell (out of 90) met the doublet threshold, while among the pericytes with Chr 22 deletion, only 2 cells (out of 32) met the doublet threshold. The results of this analysis were consistent across the two algorithms
details: Used for doublet detection with conservative 5% cutoff; among pericytes with Chr 22 deletion, only 2 out of 32 cells met doublet threshold; results consistent across both algorithms
